jelatine::VMFinalizer Class Reference

Inheritance diagram for jelatine::VMFinalizer:

Public Member Functions

void run ()
void finalize ()

Static Public Member Functions

static native VMFinalizer getNextObject ()

Detailed Description

Internal VM class used for finalizing other objects. This class uses a number of tricks to achieve its purpose. For example all objects which need to be finalized are cast to VMFinalizer even though they do not inherit from the class. Since this is done only for invoking the finalize() method which is available in every class the call works

Definition at line 32 of file VMFinalizer.java.
